_description: Volatile configuration for sqlite-integration. Re-read at invocation by SKILL.md Step 0.

fileNaming._note: Use .db by default; .sqlite/.sqlite3 are accepted alternatives.

primary.name: sqlite3
primary._note: sqlite3 is in the Python standard library — no install needed.

primary.name: better-sqlite3
primary._note: Synchronous, fast, no async overhead — preferred for most Node use cases.

schemaConventions._note: Beginner-friendly defaults. Production schemas often replace AUTOINCREMENT with ROWID.

starterTable.name: notes
starterTable.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, text TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
